title: Bounded XML Decoding, Encodings, Entities, and Structural Security · Goroutine Forensics
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Enforce compressed and decoded byte, token, element-depth, attribute, text, item, and duration limits before allocation grows unbounded.

Use an allowlisted CharsetReader, reconcile transport and XML declarations, and reject unsupported or conflicting encodings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
